changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE system_tool_risk_reduction ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, system_id integer DEFAULT NULL, risk_reduction_percent double precision DEFAULT NULL, risk_reduction double precision DEFAULT NULL, tool_price double precision DEFAULT NULL, tool_name character varying (127) DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_system_tool_risk_reduction PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_system_tool_risk_reduction_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_system_tool_risk_reduction_to_system FOREIGN KEY (system_id) REFERENCES systems (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_system_tool_risk_reduction_organization ON system_tool_risk_reduction (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_system_tool_risk_reduction_system ON system_tool_risk_reduction (system_id);
